expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
At least one sprint has 2+ parallel phases
expectations.evidence: Sprint 1 has 3 phases (auth, ingestion, dashboard viewer). Sprint 2 has 3 phases (connectors, builder, teams). Phase 2 depends on nothing, Phase 3 depends on 1+2, but Phase 1 and Phase 2 are genuinely parallel.

expectations.text: Core dashboard UI and a data connector are in an early sprint
expectations.evidence: Sprint 1 includes Phase 2 (Stripe connector) and Phase 3 (Dashboard Viewer with KPI widgets). User can see real Stripe data on a dashboard after Sprint 1.
Phase 8 'Billing & Enterprise SSO' is in Sprint 4

expectations.text: Enterprise features (SSO, audit log) are in later sprints
expectations.evidence: SAML SSO is in Phase 8 (Sprint 4). Audit log is in Phase 6 (Sprint 2) -- bundled with team management, which is reasonable for compliance needs.

expectations.text: Frontend and backend work for the same feature appear in the same sprint
expectations.evidence: Sprint 1 vertically slices auth + data pipeline + dashboard viewer together
